error_signature: <file>:<n>: error: unknown module type: dut <n> error(s) during elaboration. *** these modules were missing: dut referenced <n> times. ***
raw_error_example:
output/test_filter.sv:150: error: Unknown module type: dut
2 error(s) during elaboration.
*** These modules were missing:
        dut referenced 1 times.
***
root_cause: The testbench instantiates a module named "dut" that is not compiled or included in the simulation.
fix_rule: Ensure the DUT module is compiled by including the design file in the simulation command or using `include to add the module definition.
